message:
fix(share): harden bundle chunking and deploy validation against edge cases

bundle.rs:
- Add early-return guard in maybe_chunk_database() that returns
  ShareError::InvalidThreshold when chunk_bytes is 0, preventing a
  division-by-zero panic that could occur if a caller passed a
  zero-size chunk configuration
- Add test verifying the zero-chunk-size error path

deploy.rs:
- Extract normalize_sqlite_check_result() helper that trims whitespace
  from SQLite quick_check/integrity_check output before comparison,
  fixing false negatives when SQLite returns "ok \n" with trailing
  whitespace (observed on some SQLite builds)
- Replace inline .filter(|v| !v.is_empty()) calls with the new
  normalize helper in run_sqlite_quick_check()
- Add duplicate-path detection in parse_chunk_checksums() — if the same
  relative path appears twice in chunks.sha256, the parser now returns
  an error instead of silently using the last entry, which could mask
  chunk corruption
- Add test for duplicate chunk checksum rejection in validate_bundle()
- Add unit tests for normalize_sqlite_check_result() covering whitespace
  trimming and blank-string-to-None conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
